description_long: This is a rectangular, vertical filing cabinet with a light wood grain finish and a slightly darker trim around the top edge. The front face features two curved metal handles and two small circular lock mechanisms, indicating the presence of drawers. The cabinet's surfaces are smooth and flat, with no visible feet or wheels, giving it a sturdy and stable appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain pattern continuing seamlessly. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for storing documents or office supplies in an organized manner.
description: A light wood grain filing cabinet with two curved metal handles and lock mechanisms on the front, featuring a smooth, modern design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing two curved metal handles and two lock mechanisms on the front panel.
description_view_1: Back-left view displaying a plain wood grain surface with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_2: Back-right view showing a continuous wood grain surface, featureless and smooth.
description_view_3: Front-right view highlighting the two handles and lock mechanisms, similar to view 0 but from the opposite angle.
